title: Trim Me 2
body:
# Add trims to your Elytras!
With this new custom datapack + Resourcepack, you can now have the trims you love in your Elytras! With textures made by ChimeraDev to resemble the armor trims in the game! 

![Elytras with trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OoWDxUUx/images/d3367e5cbc91b2bdab2d385a58a8433fdbba74aa.png)

## How to use
Install the datapack and the resourcepack and trim your Elytras like you would trim armor! **Make sure to download the resource pack in the Versions tab if you're in the website!**
